# Sale Order Carrier Auto Assign

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module assigns automatically delivery carrier on sale order
confirmation.

:::{IMPORTANT}
This is an alpha version, the data model and design can change at any time without warning.
Only for development or testing purpose, do not use in production.
[More details on development status](https://odoo-community.org/page/development-status)
:::

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Configuration

To enable sale order carrier auto assign:

1. Go to *Settings > Sales > Carrier Auto Assign*.

## Bug Tracker

Bugs are tracked on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/OCA/sale-workflow/issues).
In case of trouble, please check there if your issue has already been reported.
If you spotted it first, help us to smash it by providing a detailed and welcomed
[feedback](https://github.com/OCA/sale-workflow/issues/new?body=module:%20sale_order_carrier_auto_assign%0Aversion:%2017.0%0A%0A**Steps%20to%20reproduce**%0A-%20...%0A%0A**Current%20behavior**%0A%0A**Expected%20behavior**).
